note: RESILIENT multi-operator CT collector (atlas_ct_multilog.py). crt.sh-INDEPENDENT: discovers logs dynamically from Google log_list.json (mirror + on-disk last-known-good failover), selects only state==usable logs covering NOW, speaks classic RFC-6962 get-entries AND (guarded) static-CT tile API, rotates across Google/Cloudflare/DigiCert/Sectigo-live/LE-tiled/TrustAsia/Geomys/IPng with per-log failover, crt.sh+CertSpotter as LAST-resort backstop only. Auto-skips RETIRED (LE Oak) and READONLY (Sectigo Sabre/Mammoth) logs. .gov/.mil suppression non-overridable. First apply = fetch+sha-verify + --selftest ONLY (no live poll); enable the timer after the on-box get-sth probes in DELIVER confirm fresh trees. Tiled (LE Sycamore/Willow) lane is liveness-only until CT_ENABLE_TILED=1 with confirmed tile paths.

steps.note: Multi-log CT resilience. Replaces the Argon-only/Oak-stale single-operator path. Dynamic roster = self-healing when logs retire. Run DELIVER's on-box get-sth probes before enabling the timer.

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS resilient multi-operator CT collector (fresh-SSL new-website signal)
Documentation=https://github.com/cloudwalker171/atlas-manifests
After=network-online.target postgresql.service
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=10
Environment=ATLAS_DB_ENV=/etc/atlas/db.env
Environment=CT_CAP=2000
Environment=CT_WINDOW=512
Environment=CT_ENABLE_TILED=0
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_ct_multilog.py
TimeoutStartSec=20min

[Unit]
Description=Run ATLAS multi-log CT collector every 2 min (continuous fresh-cert inflow)

[Timer]
OnBootSec=3min
OnUnitActiveSec=2min
Persistent=true
Unit=atlas-ct-multilog.service

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_ct_multilog.py':'91c05ea8a36044f744e11d14c996df108c4ceca2ea97f419f2008e8c7738c3e7'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('sha ok')"
